full_text:
Du Lu 杜路
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Du Lu (杜路)was born in Dongxi. General at Yiling, cornered by Lu Xun’s forces and surrendered. Du Lu was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom and the Wu Kingdom.
